title: Grouping of charts by days
excerpt:
Hi, how do you group the chart by days as opposed to month? 
I am trying to process map and allocate resources, but can’t find a good visual representation in Monday. 
Thanks! 
Ed

posts.author: edwardmcdscott (Edward scott)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @edwardmcdscott - welcome to the community, an extension of the monday.com family!

Are you doing this on the board level or Dashboard level? Feel free to share some screenshots and tell us a bit more about your use case so we can share some tips.
